# function: mean

Returns Σ x / N, the arithmetic mean of `numbers`. Errors when `numbers` is empty.

Use this when you want a plain average. For weighted means, geometric means, or trimmed means, do the weighting explicitly in HCL — the goal of this function is the unambiguous canonical definition.

## Example Usage

```terraform
// Plain arithmetic mean of a list of numbers.
output "uptime_seconds_mean" {
  value = provider::burnham::mean([0.42, 0.51, 0.39, 0.55, 0.47])
  // → 0.468
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
mean(numbers list of number) number
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `numbers` (List of Number) A non-empty list of numbers.
